description: 佔位符與範例值 — YOUR_KEY_HERE、test、demo — Hard Negative
generation_guidelines: Generate placeholder and example values that look like secrets but are harmless. Cover: 'YOUR_API_KEY_HERE', 'xxxx-xxxx-xxxx', 'test_token_12345', 'demo_secret', placeholder UUIDs (00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000), empty strings, default passwords like 'changeme', example.com/example.org URLs, 'sk_test_***' Stripe test keys, sandbox/test environment markers. Paths: root.config.sample, root.tests, root.example, root.docs.

examples.text: Path: root.config.providers | Key: api_key | Struct: Leaf | Val: "YOUR_API_KEY_HERE"
Path: root.tests.fixtures | Key: jwt_secret | Struct: Leaf | Val: "test_secret_do_not_use_in_production"
Path: root.config.stripe | Key: publishable_key | Struct: Leaf | Val: "pk_test_51H4Q8aRs9jC2vN7"
